creator: w.schwarzenfeld@utanet.at
text:
It is some kind of puzzeling. I cannot reproduce your output. I am not clear which terminal the program uses. I am not sure if the configure panel shows the right value for the terminal.

The is no configure file, no Makefile. I don't know where I should change anything.

The last possibility,if it does not work  is to revert the last commit.

The only error I see is in default.config

=> +set configs(termver) "Xterm" 
this could not be right, if I have different terminals.

But I think this does not really matters with the problem.
